nasb.text: and write Aaron’s name on the rod of Levi; for there is one rod for the head of each of their fathers’ households.

esv.text: and write Aaron’s name on the staff of Levi. For there shall be one staff for the head of each fathers’ house.

cnv.text: 又要把亞倫的名字寫在利未的杖上，因為照著他們父家各族長必有一根杖。

ccb.text: 你要把亚伦的名字写在利未支派的杖上，每个支派的首领都要有一根杖。
